title: adversarial-project: slash command
goal: Add an 'adversarial-project' CommandDef to COMMAND_DEFS so install-commands idempotently generates /mini:adversarial-project; its body runs 'mini context adversarial-project $ARGUMENTS' with the same range flags (--from-phase/--to-phase, --from/--to) and carries the same independence warning as /mini:adversarial. Extend install-commands.test.ts to assert the file is generated with the expected frontmatter and body.

steps.title: Add adversarial-project CommandDef to COMMAND_DEFS
steps.detail: New entry in COMMAND_DEFS (src/install/commands.ts) with name: 'adversarial-project', a description, an argumentHint listing [--from-phase N --to-phase M | --from <ref> --to <ref>], and a custom body that runs 'mini context adversarial-project $ARGUMENTS'.

steps.title: Carry the independence warning in the body
steps.detail: The body carries the same independence warning as /mini:adversarial (inline review shares the author's context -> prefer 'mini adversarial-project' in a terminal or /clear first) and briefly maps the range flags onto 'mini context adversarial-project'.

steps.title: Add adversarial-project to the install-commands hint line
steps.detail: Add 'adversarial-project' to the command list in log.hint(...) in src/commands/install-commands.ts so the post-install summary matches the files actually generated.

steps.title: Extend install-commands.test.ts for the new command
steps.detail: Add adversarial-project.md to the expected file list and a new 'it' asserting the file contains 'mini context adversarial-project', an 'argument-hint:' with the range flags, and the independence passage. npm test + typecheck pass.
